categories.name: Antipasti
categories.description: Traditional Italian starters to awaken the palate

categories.name: Pizza
categories.description: Wood-fired pizzas with authentic Neapolitan crust

categories.name: Secondi
categories.description: Hearty main courses of meat and fish

categories.name: Vini
categories.description: Curated Italian wines by the glass or bottle

menuItems.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
menuItems.description: Toasted house-made ciabatta topped with vine-ripened San Marzano tomatoes, fresh basil, extra virgin olive oil, and a touch of aged balsamic.

menuItems.name: Calamari Fritti
menuItems.description: Lightly battered squid rings fried to golden perfection, served with lemon aioli and a sprinkle of smoked paprika.

menuItems.name: Tagliatelle al Tartufo
menuItems.description: Silky egg tagliatelle tossed in a velvety cream sauce with black truffle shavings and Parmigiano-Reggiano.

menuItems.name: Spaghetti alla Carbonara
menuItems.description: A Roman classic — guanciale, egg yolk, Pecorino Romano, and black pepper. No cream, no shortcuts.

menuItems.name: Lasagna alla Bolognese
menuItems.description: Layers of fresh pasta sheets, slow-simmered ragù, béchamel, and melted Parmigiano, baked until bubbling.

menuItems.name: Pizza Margherita D.O.C.
menuItems.description: San Marzano tomato sauce, fior di latte mozzarella, fresh basil, and extra virgin olive oil on a charred Neapolitan crust.

menuItems.name: Pizza Diavola
menuItems.description: Spicy 'nduja sausage, mozzarella, roasted red peppers, and a drizzle of hot honey on a thin, crispy crust.

menuItems.name: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
menuItems.description: 32oz prime T-bone steak grilled over charcoal, finished with flaky sea salt, rosemary, and a squeeze of lemon.

menuItems.name: Branzino al Forno
menuItems.description: Whole Mediterranean sea bass baked in a salt crust with fennel, cherry tomatoes, and Kalamata olives.

menuItems.name: Tiramisù Classico
menuItems.description: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers layered with mascarpone cream, finished with a dusting of Valrhona cocoa.

menuItems.name: Panna Cotta al Caramello
menuItems.description: Silky vanilla panna cotta topped with a salted caramel sauce and toasted hazelnuts.

menuItems.name: Barolo DOCG 2019
menuItems.description: Nebbiolo from the Piedmont region — bold tannins with notes of cherry, rose, and truffle. 750ml.
